LanguageData.TW_Mech_Doxa.label: Doxa
LanguageData.TW_Mech_Doxa.description:
Doxa is among the most tactically sophisticated mechanoids. Originally based on arachnid predators, it was rebuilt into an autonomous titan-class fire control nexus. Designed not for quick elimination but for gradual paralysis through sustained suppression and battlefield management. Its deployment signals regional decisive engagements.
Doxa advances slowly with rhythmic cadence. When anchored in Artillery Lock mode, it deploys third-segment rocket arrays for continuous shield-penetrating bombardment. Sacrificing mobility, it becomes a semi-permanent firebase suppressing enemy concentrations.
Its deadliest feature: periodically releasing Shellsplitter - micro-units with erratic trajectories that explode terminally, disrupting formations. These are tactical disruptors, not direct damage dealers.
Doxa's neural core creates intelligent tactical networks through real-time fire distribution and target prioritization. Unchecked deployment risks dismantling entire defensive lines and losing battlefield initiative.
Doxa isn't a frontline fighter but a theater-level tempo controller. Failure to neutralize it promptly leads to colony's operational death.
LanguageData.TW_Mech_Doxa.tools.head.label: head
LanguageData.TW_Mech_Shellsplitter_Spider.label: Shellsplitter
LanguageData.TW_Mech_Shellsplitter_Spider.description:
Short-range assault units spawned from Doxa-series incubation systems. Lightweight exoskeletons with high-frequency vibration materials enable rapid slashing attacks effective at infantry suppression and formation disruption.
Unlike most expendable mechanoids, Shellsplitter Spiders function as "engage-and-detonate" frontline disruptors. They deliver high-frequency melee strikes until structural failure triggers localized fragmentation explosions - damaging electronics while causing area-denial effects.
Typically deployed in swarms via rapid batch production, they execute infiltration, area denial, and tactical self-destruction missions with cold determination - fulfilling tactical purpose through approach, shred, and detonation.
